headline: Invesco Canada announces cash distributions for its ETFs
summary: Invesco Canada Ltd. ("Invesco") announced today the April 2026 distributions for its exchange-traded funds (ETFs). Unitholders of record on April 29, 2026, will receive cash distributions payable on May 7, 2026.

headline: Market breadth is leading stocks higher not just tech, says Invesco's Brian Levitt
summary: Brian Levitt, Invesco chief global market strategist, joins 'Power Lunch' to discuss the renewed attention in technology stocks, the QQQ and much more.
